name: Matchbook Predictions
oneliner: FCA-licensed UK prediction market launching yes / no event contracts — the first regulated Kalshi-style venue in Europe.
finserv: First FCA-authorised prediction market in the UK; Gibraltar licence also in hand; US regulatory pipeline targeted for 2026.
team: Majority-owned by professional gambler Zeljko Ranogajec; Matthew Benham (Brentford FC) minority stake; operator bench drawn from quantitative betting markets.
thesis: Event contracts are a clean Caroline Federal inversion — turning a derivative that used to be institution-only into a retail UX. Being first-and-licensed in the UK matters because the European regulatory mood on prediction markets is hardening, and whoever is live while the rules are being written has outsized optionality. Biggest concern: perception is still closer to sports betting than to finance.
